creator: antoine.brodin@laposte.net
text:
Changelog (from http://slipgate.za.net/dosage/downloads/changelog):
Dosage v.1.6.0:
    * The "Not Dead Yet" release.
    * Added / Fixed / etc. comics:
        - Too many to list, really.
    * New dependencies:
        - Twisted
        - zope.interface (not zope)
    * Revamped plugin system, the first step on the road to Twisted.
